CapSideBar.notes: CapSideBar accepts menuData array with {title, key, link}. selectedKeys controls active item.

CapMenu.notes: CapMenu used inside CapSideBar for nav items. mode=inline for vertical sidebar.

CapHeading.notes: type: h1|h2|h3|h4|h5|h6. Page title 24px medium maps to h2. Section title 16px medium maps to h4.

CapLabel.notes: type: label1..label7. 12px regular #97a0af maps to label3. 12px regular #5e6c84 maps to label1. 14px regular maps to label4.

CapButton.notes: type: primary|secondary|link. Primary is green (#42b040). px-24 py-10 border-radius-4.

CapTable.notes: pagination={false} per Figma. bordered=true. rowKey should be 'id'. onChange handles sort. locale accepts emptyText for empty state.

CapInput.notes: label associates accessible form label with input. errorMessage shows inline error.

CapSelect.notes: options: [{label, value}]. Used for Data type selector (STRING/DATE/NUMBER).

CapModal.notes: Maps from Figma CapPopover to CapModal per FR-3/FR-7. destroyOnClose clears form state.

CapIcon.notes: type maps to icon name. Sort icon = carrot type. Size 20px = size='s'.

CapRow.notes: type='flex' for flex row. justify='space-between' for header rows.

CapColumn.notes: Vertical stacking container. No flex-specific props needed for basic usage.
